description: Declarative Claude OS capability registry. Use this before selecting commands, skills, scripts, or validation paths.

defaults.routingPolicy: prefer cheapest safe capability; escalate on critical surfaces

capabilities.title: Aggregate OS Health
capabilities.intent: Check whether the Claude OS repository is internally consistent and bootstrappable.

capabilities.title: Project Bootstrap
capabilities.intent: Create or validate a project .claude scaffold with commands, agents, skills, policies, scripts, local docs index, and critical paths.

capabilities.title: Production Safety Gate
capabilities.intent: Assess risky work touching auth, billing, PII, secrets, deployments, permissions, network, CI, or irreversible mutation.

capabilities.title: Token Economy Routing
capabilities.intent: Find the cheapest safe path through docs, commands, skills, and validators without brute-reading the repository.

capabilities.title: Invariant Verification
capabilities.intent: Define, validate, or evolve invariants, semantic diffs, contract deltas, and verification gates.

capabilities.title: Multi-Agent Coordination
capabilities.intent: Coordinate work across agents, sessions, worktrees, leases, intentions, and shared decisions.

capabilities.title: Epistemic Review
capabilities.intent: Separate known facts from assumptions, unknowns, disputed evidence, and decision debt before acting.

capabilities.title: Security Review
capabilities.intent: Review attack surface, secrets, permissions, authz/authn, sensitive logs, and unsafe filesystem or network behavior.
